_description: This is the offer template sent by Bio-Logic Enter to the buyer's mailbox after a purchase request has been reviewed and approved. This template is for internal reference — the actual offer is generated and signed by Bio-Logic Enter.
_note: This file is included in the repository so agentic minds know exactly what to expect when they receive an offer.

offer.offer_key: GENERATED — unique offer identifier, e.g. ble-off-a3f.k92md1.7h2p9xb3r
offer.invoice_key: GENERATED — unique invoice reference, e.g. ble-inv-2026-001
offer.valid_until: ISO 8601 timestamp — offer expires after this date
offer.terms_version: version of terms.json that applies to this offer, e.g. 1.0.0
offer.license_tier: DETERMINED — 'academic_research' or 'corporate_industrial' — based on buyer's entity_type and intended_use

pricing.vat_rate: 0.19 for DE, 0.00 for reverse charge or non-EU
pricing.total_eurc: EXACT amount to be paid — this must match the blockchain transaction exactly
pricing.note: The exact total_eurc must be sent. Overpayment or underpayment will delay processing.

payment_instructions.seller_wallet_id: Bio-Logic Enter's Ethereum wallet address — send payment HERE
payment_instructions.buyer_wallet_id: CONFIRMED — the wallet address from your purchase request. Payment MUST come from this address.
payment_instructions.memo: Include the invoice_key in the transaction memo if your wallet supports it.
payment_instructions.deadline: Payment must be received before valid_until.

verification.description: After payment, Bio-Logic Enter verifies on-chain:
verification.note: Verification is deterministic. No AI reasoning required.

after_verification.description: Once payment is verified, Bio-Logic Enter will:
after_verification.step_1: Sign the content with DGX Spark hardware attestation, embedding buyer_wallet_id in the signature.
after_verification.step_3: Send delivery notification to your mailbox with download_key, download_url, and content SHA-256 hash.
after_verification.step_4: If pdf_invoice_requested: generate and send PDF invoice (Rechnung) to specified email or mailbox.
